header.liveMetricsHint: Controls automatic refresh for live data across the site (tickers, headlines, Polymarket, panels). Off = load once when you open a page; no background polling while this tab stays open.
header.liveMetricsAriaOn: Live metrics on, automatic refresh enabled site-wide
header.liveMetricsAriaOff: Snapshot mode, no automatic refresh site-wide

common.feedOfflineRetry: Feed offline. Data will retry on refresh.
common.newsFeedOffline: News feed offline. Refresh to retry.

predictions.title: Predictions · scenarios
predictions.subtitle: Split live market prices (Polymarket) from editorial reasoning frameworks below. None of this is individualized investment, legal, or policy advice.
predictions.panelDisclaimer: Verify every path with OSINT, Map overlays, Alerts, and primary sources before acting.
predictions.badgeEditorialHint: Structured reasoning aids only—not model output, not exchange quotes.
predictions.polySource: Polymarket (Gamma API). Numbers are traded implied probabilities; markets can be thin, biased, or wrong.
predictions.polyEmpty: Prediction markets feed offline. Retry shortly.
predictions.scenarioLead: The Iran / Strait–style chain you described is a reasoning template for how shocks propagate—not a claim that any step will happen now.
predictions.chain1: Energy chokepoint tension → crude & product spreads; freight, insurance, and reroutes.
predictions.chain2: Refined products & natgas inputs → fertilizer / nitrogen costs → grower margins.
predictions.chain3: Food prices & availability → politics of subsidies, aid, and unrest risk in import-dependent cities.
predictions.chain4: Water stress, soil moisture, and irrigation constraints where agriculture is vulnerable.
predictions.chain5: Further industrial inputs (e.g. helium, specialty gases) only where trade chatter ties to real bottlenecks—confirm with flows, not headlines alone.
predictions.chainVerify: Cross-check: top oil importers, published reserves/SPR where available, cargo & AIS context (Map), regional FX passthrough.
predictions.tradeSignalsBody: Who imports the most oil or gas, where strategic stocks sit, and what lanes move molecules and grain—that dependence is signal. City-level demand matters when you tie it to customs, port delays, or bills of lading—not vibes.
predictions.eventsHorizonBody: Stack prediction-market titles against dated catalysts: OPEC+, sanctions rounds, military exercises, planting/harvest windows, major weather, central-bank weeks. If a Poly market has no calendar anchor, treat the price as noise until it does.
predictions.positioningLead: Questions to break your thesis—not recommendations to buy or sell.
predictions.positioningQ1: If the risk catalyst clears badly, what reprices first: equities, credit spreads, or commodity curves?
predictions.positioningQ2: Who cannot substitute supply inside 90–180 days, and what data would prove substitution?
predictions.positioningQ3: What observation would falsify the story (evidence that ends the narrative)?
predictions.historyLensBody: Analog years help only when the mechanism matches: energy intensity, inflation regime, dollar liquidity, and geographic exposures. Reject one-to-one headline mapping to a past conflict unless those align.
predictions.d1: Tape + watchlist: risk-on/off vs commodities and FX.
predictions.d2: Polymarket for crowd odds; always cross wires, conflict feed, and primary documents.
predictions.d3: Cargo / air overlays + regional FX show trade dependency before you size anything.
predictions.d4: Separate "real" prints (exchangeable data) from placeholder narratives until you have a feed.
predictions.psychBody: Shocks shorten planning horizons: capex freezes, safety stock builds, sharper e-commerce promos, and risk-off social mood. Watch headline persistence, policy surprise, and whether consumers retrench—single prints lie; sequences matter.

today.snapshot: Snapshot of global indices, FX, and a simple volatility proxy based on {index}. Updated live from public feeds.
today.volatilityProxy: Simple volatility proxy via CBOE VIX from live quote feed.
today.worldMapDesc: Live Leaflet map with the same overlays as the Map page. Pan, zoom, and open the full radar view for layer controls.
today.noUpdatesYet: No conflict updates yet. Markets and feeds updating live.

decode.title: Decode test (no LLM)
decode.subtitle: Why it matters + ELI5 from lookup; Decode badges from phrase lists. Switch to Live to run decode on real conflict headlines.
decode.liveFetchFailed: Live fetch failed: {err}. Using sample or try again.
decode.noPatterns: No manipulation cues, significant numbers, date symbolism, or society keywords detected in this text. Try Live headlines or add more patterns over time.

map.noActivityByRegion: Activity: no events by region in this snapshot.
map.noClip: No clip available. Link to source below.
map.realMetricsDesc: Real metrics: OpenSky flights; cargo lanes + vessels when VESSEL_API_URL set.

chat.noBuddies: No buddies yet. Load from directory or invite.
chat.noRooms: No rooms yet. Create or join from your organization.
chat.noChatSelected: Select a buddy or room to chat.
chat.emptyProfile: Set screen name and status. Profile syncs with your org.
chat.sidebarHint: Use the Chat button or open the chat page for real-time messaging.

ai.title: AI assist
ai.subtitle: Ask about the data, build strategy, or explore the dashboard.
ai.emptyHint: Send a message to start. Connect an AI backend for real analysis and strategy.
ai.replyPlaceholder: You asked: "{text}". Connect an AI API to this panel to get real answers about the data, strategy, and building analysis.

tutorial.title: Quick start
tutorial.body1: This dashboard gives you a single live picture of global markets, news, and events. Use it to build situational awareness: what is happening right now, where, and in what order.
tutorial.body2: Today shows the snapshot; the Map shows geography and movement; Events and Wartime show the timeline. Together they give you context and history.
tutorial.body3: Use that context to spot patterns and anticipate what might come next. No crystal ball — just a clearer view of the board so you can think ahead.
